blocks.text: Bø on the track, Reitan on the leaderboard — Norway's big Friday
🎿 16:10 — Bø, Lægreid & co. gun for biathlon glory in 20km Individual, Kontiolahti
🏅 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony, Milano-Cortina
Norwegian football's week in extremes: Bodo/Glimt stunned Inter 2-1 in the Champions League on Tuesday, while KFUM players now face match-fixing charges. The sport contains multitudes.
